query:
Here's the design compiled for issue 439: Root Cause: Missing observability — nli_scores: Vec<NliScores> is fully materialized after the rayon scoring barrier but its distribution is never inspected or logged. The completion log fires
  after the edge write with only edges_written/pairs_scored, leaving threshold tuning blind.                                                                                                         
                                                                            
  Affected Files: crates/unimatrix-server/src/services/nli_detection_tick.rs                                                                                                                         
                                                                            
  Proposed Fix:                                                                                                                                                                                      
  1. Extract a private helper fn nli_score_stats(scores: &[NliScores]) -> (f32, f32, f32) (returning (max, mean, p75)) with an empty-slice guard returning (0.0, 0.0, 0.0)
  2. p75 nearest-rank: (((0.75 * n as f32).ceil() as usize).saturating_sub(1)).min(n - 1) — consistent with compute_observed_spread in status.rs                                                     
  3. Emit tracing::debug!(nli_score_max, nli_score_mean, nli_score_p75, threshold = config.supports_edge_threshold, pairs = n, "graph inference tick: nli score distribution") between the
  length-mismatch guard (line ~267) and write_pairs construction (line ~276)                                                                                                                         
  4. Unit tests covering: empty slice, single element, multi-element with known expected values                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                     
  Design Review: APPROVED WITH NOTES                                                                                                                                                                 
  - No hot-path risk — pure CPU on a bounded vec (≤100 elements), no I/O, no locks                                                                                                                   
  - The empty-slice guard must be explicit in the helper (not just relied on by the call site)                                                                                                       
  - .min(n - 1) must be present in the p75 formula (not just saturating_sub(1))                                                                                                                      
  - Keep f32 throughout — NLI scores are at the ONNX boundary

entries.title: Tick completion log without score distribution makes threshold tuning a blind guess
Graph inference edge stall: supports_edge_threshold too conservative for retrospective-dominated corpus
Batch all NLI pairs into a single rayon_pool.spawn() per tick pass — never split across multiple dispatches
Extract NLI sort logic as pub(crate) pure function to enable unit tests without ONNX model
NliProviderExt: add health check to wrapped type, not as trait in consuming crate
